induction_input: The report the editor reviewed passed.
The cake the chef baked disappeared.
The bill the senator proposed failed.
The bridge the engineer designed collapsed.
The novel the author wrote sold.
induced_prompt_raw: Write sentences using center-embedded reduced relative clauses, where a subject noun is modified by a clause with an agent and transitive verb, followed by a simple intransitive verb.
induced_prompt: Write sentences using center-embedded reduced relative clauses, where a subject noun is modified by a clause with an agent and transitive verb, followed by a simple intransitive verb.
l2_sentences: The deer the hunters chased fled.
The cake the chef baked disappeared.
The letter the student wrote vanished.
The ball the children kicked rolled.
The book the professor recommended sold.
l1_sentences: The report the editor reviewed passed.
